items.title: FDA Extends Approval of PKU Drug to Include Adolescents
items.description: Previously only approved for adults, BioMarin’s pegvaliase-pqpz (PALYNZIQ) is now licensed for patients as young as 12 years. Medscape Medical News

items.title: Children With OSA Have Greater Risk for Flu and COVID
items.description: Surprisingly, adenotonsillectomy for obstructive sleep apnea did not reduce the risk. Medscape Medical News

items.title: Work Disability Risk Can Persist Years After TBI
